title: MaskyEnchantedItems
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/II6QNeJuPjM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
MaskyEnchantedItems is a resourcecepack based on MaskyTweaks that aims to improve the appearance of enchanted items in a new way.

+1.21.5 features! 

This need [RespackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) Mod

New Enchanted Models for:
- Sword's
- Axe's
- Pickaxe's
- Shovel's
- Hoe's
- Bow
- Crossbow
- Mace & Optional 3D Mace
- Shield
- Trident
- Enchanted Book
- Netherite Armor Icon's
- Diamond Armor Icon's
- Iron Armor Icon's
- Golden Armor Icon's
- Chainmail Armor Icon's
- Leather Armor Icon's

[Discord](https://discord.gg/NHheAr79Fs)

[Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/elitefantasy/shop)
